---
title: "Universal Modeling Mastery"
subtitle: "54 Graduate-Level Textbooks · 459 Chapters · Interactive Learning"
---

## Welcome

This is a self-contained graduate curriculum in mathematical modeling, spanning pure mathematics, applied statistics, computational science, and domain-specific modeling across biostatistics, geospatial science, agent-based modeling, scientific machine learning, population dynamics, physical systems, and cross-cutting methods.

Every chapter includes rigorous theory (definitions, theorems, proofs), worked examples, Julia implementations, and exercises at three Bloom's taxonomy levels (Apply, Analyze, Create).

---

## Interactive Learning Tools

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple" icon=false}

### Concept Map Navigator
Explore the dependency graph of 55+ major concepts across all 8 tracks. See what prerequisites each topic requires and what it enables.

[**Launch Concept Map**](interactive/concept-map.html){.btn .btn-primary}

### Phase Portrait Explorer
Place initial conditions on 2D dynamical systems (Lotka-Volterra, Van der Pol, SIR, Damped Pendulum) and watch trajectories evolve.

[**Launch Phase Portraits**](interactive/phase-portrait.html){.btn .btn-primary}

### Gradient Descent Visualizer
Compare 4 optimization algorithms on classic test functions with real-time contour plots.

[**Launch Optimizer**](interactive/gradient-descent.html){.btn .btn-primary}

### Distribution Playground
Adjust parameters of 6 probability distributions and see PDF, CDF, and histogram views update in real time.

[**Launch Distributions**](interactive/distribution.html){.btn .btn-primary}

### Self-Assessment Quiz Engine
Test your knowledge with spaced-repetition quizzes across all tracks and Bloom's taxonomy levels.

[**Launch Quiz Engine**](interactive/quiz.html){.btn .btn-primary}

### Proof Explorer
Step through proofs with collapsible steps, intuition vs formal mode toggle, and exercises.

[**Launch Proof Explorer**](interactive/proof-explorer.html){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

---

## Curriculum (54 textbooks, 459 chapters)

### Core Mathematics (17 textbooks)

CORE-001 through CORE-016 covering real analysis, linear algebra, measure theory, scientific computing, functional analysis, probability, ODEs, statistics, PDEs, stochastic processes, Bayesian theory, numerical methods for DEs, differential geometry, nonlinear PDEs, computational statistics, and optimization.

**New:** CORE-017 — Numerical Linear Algebra (11 chapters): floating-point arithmetic, LU/Cholesky/QR, SVD, eigenvalue algorithms, Krylov methods, sparse computation, randomized NLA, matrix functions, structured matrices, HPC.

### Applied Tracks (26 textbooks)

BIO-001 through BIO-008 (Biostatistics) · GEO-001 through GEO-005 (Geospatial) · ABM-001 through ABM-004 (Agent-Based) · SCIML-001 through SCIML-005 (Scientific ML) · POP-001 through POP-004 (Population Dynamics) · PHYS-001 through PHYS-004 (Physical Systems)

### Cross-Cutting Methods (7 textbooks)

UQ-001 (Uncertainty Quantification) · CROSS-001 through CROSS-005 (Dynamical Systems, Optimal Transport, Inverse Problems, Information Geometry, Multiscale Methods)

**New:** CROSS-006 — Model Selection, Validation, and Scientific Judgment (10 chapters): bias-variance, AIC/BIC, cross-validation, Bayes factors, WAIC/PSIS-LOO, posterior predictive checks, sensitivity analysis, model averaging, ODE model selection, philosophy of model choice.

---

## Challenge Labs

Five integrative capstone projects spanning multiple textbooks:

1. **Clinical Trial Analysis Pipeline** — BIO-001, BIO-002, BIO-004, CORE-011
2. **Discover Governing Equations from Noisy Data** — SCIML-002, UQ-001, CROSS-003, SCIML-004
3. **Spatial Disease Spread Prediction** — BIO-008, GEO-002, ABM-001, BIO-007
4. **Blood Flow in a Stenosed Artery** — PHYS-001, PHYS-003, PHYS-004, CORE-009
5. **Bayesian Model Selection for Population Dynamics** — CORE-011, POP-001, POP-002, CROSS-006

Labs available as [Pluto.jl notebooks](https://github.com/timothyhartzog/modeling/tree/main/labs).

---

**Source:** [github.com/timothyhartzog/modeling](https://github.com/timothyhartzog/modeling) · **Language:** Julia (exclusive) · **Validation:** 16 automated checks per chapter
